instructions: Work through features in order. Only change 'failing' to 'passing' after verifying in the browser at http://localhost:3000. Never remove entries.

features.name: Next.js + TypeScript scaffold
features.description: npm run dev starts at localhost:3000 without errors

features.name: Tailwind dark mode
features.description: bg-gray-950 background renders, dark class on <html>

features.name: Static export configured
features.description: next.config.js has output: 'export' and trailingSlash: true, npm run build creates out/

features.name: Supabase client wired
features.description: src/lib/supabase.ts exports client, missing env vars throw clear error

features.name: App shell with sidebar navigation
features.description: Sidebar with 4 Next.js Link items, active route highlighted indigo, / redirects to /dashboard

features.name: useGoals hook
features.description: src/hooks/useGoals.ts — fetches active goals on mount, exposes: goals, loading, error, createGoal, updateGoal, deleteGoal, archiveGoal

features.name: goalHelpers utility
features.description: src/lib/goalHelpers.ts — calculateProgress(tasks: Task[]): number — returns 0-100. Pure function.

features.name: Goals list view
features.description: src/app/goals/page.tsx renders list of active goals using useGoals hook

features.name: GoalProgressBar component
features.description: src/components/GoalProgressBar.tsx — renders filled bar from 0-100 prop, indigo fill

features.name: GoalCard component
features.description: src/components/GoalCard.tsx — shows title, description, target date, status badge, GoalProgressBar

features.name: Create goal form
features.description: Modal or inline form: title (required), description, target_date. Calls useGoals.createGoal.

features.name: Edit goal
features.description: Pre-populated form for all goal fields. Calls useGoals.updateGoal.

features.name: Delete goal
features.description: Confirmation dialog then useGoals.deleteGoal removes from Supabase

features.name: Archive goal
features.description: Sets goal status to 'archived' via useGoals.archiveGoal, hides from active list

features.name: View linked tasks per goal
features.description: Expand a GoalCard to see tasks linked to that goal (filtered from task list)

features.name: useTasks hook
features.description: src/hooks/useTasks.ts — fetches active tasks, exposes: tasks, loading, error, createTask, updateTask, deleteTask, completeTask

features.name: taskHelpers utility
features.description: src/lib/taskHelpers.ts — filterTasks(tasks, filters): Task[] and sortTasks(tasks, sort): Task[] — pure functions

features.name: Tasks list view
features.description: src/app/tasks/page.tsx renders all active tasks using useTasks hook

features.name: TaskCard component
features.description: src/components/TaskCard.tsx — shows title, priority badge, due date, category, goal link label

features.name: Priority color coding
features.description: TaskCard: high=red-500, medium=amber-400, low=green-400 badge styling

features.name: Create task form
features.description: Form: title (required), priority dropdown, due_date, category, goal_id select. Calls useTasks.createTask.

features.name: Edit task
features.description: Pre-populated form for all task fields. Calls useTasks.updateTask.

features.name: Complete task action
features.description: INSERT into archived_tasks + DELETE from tasks + recalculate goal progress via useGoals

features.name: Delete task
features.description: Confirmation dialog then useTasks.deleteTask removes from Supabase

features.name: SubtaskList component
features.description: src/components/SubtaskList.tsx — renders subtask list with checkboxes for a given task

features.name: Subtasks — add subtask
features.description: Inline input in SubtaskList to add a new subtask. Saves to Supabase subtasks table.

features.name: Subtasks — complete subtask
features.description: Checking a subtask updates completed=true in Supabase

features.name: Subtasks — lazy load on expand
features.description: Subtasks fetched from Supabase only when TaskCard is expanded — not on initial page load

features.name: Subtasks — all-done prompt
features.description: When all subtasks checked, show prompt 'All subtasks done — mark task complete?' No auto-complete.

features.name: Dashboard view scaffold
features.description: src/app/dashboard/page.tsx renders 3 sections: Today's Tasks, Overdue Tasks, Goals Overview

features.name: Today's tasks section
features.description: Tasks where due_date = today shown in Dashboard Today section

features.name: Overdue tasks section
features.description: Tasks where due_date < today shown with red highlight in Dashboard Overdue section

features.name: Goal progress overview section
features.description: All active goals with GoalProgressBar shown in Dashboard Goals Overview section

features.name: Quick-add task from Dashboard
features.description: Inline minimal form on Dashboard: title + priority + optional due date. Calls useTasks.createTask.

features.name: FilterBar component
features.description: src/components/FilterBar.tsx — dropdowns for priority, goal, category, due-date-range

features.name: Filter by priority
features.description: FilterBar priority selection filters Tasks view client-side via taskHelpers.filterTasks

features.name: Filter by goal
features.description: FilterBar goal selection filters Tasks view to tasks linked to that goal

features.name: Filter by due date
features.description: FilterBar date range (today / this week / overdue) filters Tasks view

features.name: Filter by category
features.description: FilterBar category selection filters Tasks view by task.category

features.name: Search tasks and goals
features.description: Search input filters tasks and goals by title/description, client-side

features.name: useArchive hook
features.description: src/hooks/useArchive.ts — fetches archived_tasks and archived/completed goals only when called

features.name: Archive view
features.description: src/app/archive/page.tsx renders completed tasks and archived goals via useArchive on demand

features.name: Archived tasks list
features.description: List of archived_tasks with completion date and goal link shown in Archive view

features.name: Archived goals list
features.description: Goals with status='archived' or 'completed' listed in Archive view

features.name: Email summary stub route
features.description: src/app/api/send-summary/route.ts — GET returns JSON summary of active tasks+goals. Logs to console. See file for activation instructions.

features.name: Loading states
features.description: Skeleton or spinner on Goals and Tasks views while Supabase data fetches (from hook loading state)

features.name: Empty states
features.description: Friendly message when no goals or tasks exist

features.name: Error handling
features.description: Supabase errors displayed as inline message or toast (from hook error state)

features.name: Responsive layout
features.description: Layout works at min 768px without horizontal scroll

features.name: Schema migration for user_id + RLS
features.description: user_id column on goals, tasks, archived_tasks. RLS policies on all 4 tables.

features.name: useAuth hook
features.description: Exposes user, loading, signIn(email), signOut. Manages session via supabase.auth.

features.name: AuthProvider context
features.description: Wraps app in layout.tsx, provides auth state to all children via useAuthContext.

features.name: Login page
features.description: /login route with email input, magic link flow, success/error states.

features.name: Auth-guarded layout
features.description: Redirect to /login if no session. Loading spinner during session check.

features.name: Update hooks with user_id
features.description: createGoal, createTask, completeTask inserts include user_id from auth context.

features.name: Sign out
features.description: Logout button in sidebar shows email and calls signOut.
